meaning: n.狂犬病患者,[化]疏水物,憎水物
examples: The higher mole fraction of hydrophobe, the stronger viscosity enhancement effect.
All raw materials are hydrophobe, no air pores. It proven that it has the best anticorrosion performance in all know tube plates.
There is tow kinds of aminophenol in the protein sequence, the one is hydrophobe aminophenol, the other is hydrophile aminophenol.
